title: Christmas Morning Breakfast Casserole
ingredients: 4-6 slices of white bread (depends on size of bread slices)
1 pound bulk sausage (spicy or regular), browned and drained
Make the night before and place in refrigerator to bake in the morning.
Lightly grease 13x9 inch pan. Tear up bread slices in pieces. Spoon cooked sausage over bread. Sprinkle with grated cheese.
Put eggs, milk, dry mustard, salt and pepper in blender. Blend until well combined. Pour over bread mixture in pan. Refrigerate overnight.
To bake, cook 35-40 minutes at 350 degrees F. Serve with ketchup if your Dad is there.
